questions.question: A file on disk is decoded into a NumPy array with shape (224, 224, 3) and dtype uint8. What does each number represent?
questions.question_zh: 磁盘上的图片文件解码成形状为 (224, 224, 3)、dtype 为 uint8 的 NumPy 数组，里面的每个数字代表什么？
options: The probability that a pixel is that colour, between 0 and 1
One photon count per detector, normalized to the full dynamic range of the sensor
A sample of light intensity at one grid position, quantized to one of 256 levels per channel
A floating-point brightness value ready to feed to a convolutional network
options_zh: 像素属于该颜色的概率，取值在 0 到 1 之间
每个探测器上的光子计数，按传感器满量程动态范围归一化
在某个网格位置上对光强的一次采样，每个通道量化为 256 级中的一级
已经准备好喂给卷积网络的浮点亮度值
questions.explanation: A uint8 image stores 8-bit integers in [0, 255]. Each integer is one quantized sample of light intensity at one (row, column, channel) position. It is neither a probability nor a float; you must divide by 255 and standardize before feeding it to a pretrained model.
questions.explanation_zh: uint8 图像保存的是 [0, 255] 区间的 8 位整数。每个整数是 (行, 列, 通道) 位置上对光强的一次量化采样。它既不是概率也不是浮点数，要先除以 255 再做标准化，才能喂给预训练模型。

questions.question: You load an image with Pillow and get an array of shape (480, 640, 3). You pass it as a batched tensor (1, 480, 640, 3) to a PyTorch Conv2d with in_channels=3. What happens?
questions.question_zh: 你用 Pillow 读图，得到形状为 (480, 640, 3) 的数组，然后把它当成 (1, 480, 640, 3) 的 batch tensor 传给一个 in_channels=3 的 PyTorch Conv2d，会发生什么？
options: Nothing — PyTorch auto-detects the layout
The first conv layer treats height as the channel axis, producing meaningless feature maps
PyTorch raises a RuntimeError: Conv2d expects NCHW, sees 480 channels where the weight expects 3, and refuses to run
Accuracy drops by a few percent but inference still works
options_zh: 什么也不会发生——PyTorch 会自动检测布局
第一层 conv 把高度当成通道轴，产生毫无意义的 feature map
PyTorch 抛出 RuntimeError：Conv2d 期望 NCHW，发现 480 个通道而权重要求 3 个，直接拒绝运行
准确率下降几个百分点，但推理仍然能跑
questions.explanation: PyTorch Conv2d enforces strict channel-count checking against the weight tensor. A batched HWC input (1, 480, 640, 3) is interpreted as NCHW with C=480, which does not match the weight's expected 3 channels, and PyTorch raises RuntimeError before any computation. The loud failure is a feature — it forces you to fix the layout. You must permute to NCHW (`.permute(0, 3, 1, 2)`) before feeding PyTorch.
questions.explanation_zh: PyTorch Conv2d 会严格按权重张量校验通道数。形状为 (1, 480, 640, 3) 的 HWC 输入会被解释成 NCHW，此时 C=480，与权重期望的 3 个通道对不上，于是 PyTorch 在任何计算开始前就抛出 RuntimeError。这种「响亮的失败」反而是好事，会逼你把布局改正。喂给 PyTorch 前必须先 permute 成 NCHW（`.permute(0, 3, 1, 2)`）。

questions.question: Why do ImageNet pretrained models expect inputs standardized with mean=[0.485, 0.456, 0.406] and std=[0.229, 0.224, 0.225]?
questions.question_zh: 为什么 ImageNet 上预训练的模型期望输入用 mean=[0.485, 0.456, 0.406]、std=[0.229, 0.224, 0.225] 做标准化？
options: Those are the RGB values of an average natural scene
Those are the per-channel mean and standard deviation of the ImageNet training set in [0, 1] space, so subtracting them centers the distribution the model was trained on
They make the input strictly zero-mean unit-variance for any image
They are required by the ReLU activation function
options_zh: 这是平均自然场景的 RGB 值
这是 ImageNet 训练集像素归一化到 [0, 1] 后每个通道的均值和标准差，减掉它们就把输入对齐到模型训练时见过的分布
它们能让任意图片严格变成零均值、单位方差
ReLU 激活函数要求这么做
questions.explanation: The numbers are statistics of the ImageNet training corpus computed after dividing pixels by 255. Using them aligns your input distribution with the one the network saw during training. For a model trained on a different dataset you would recompute the stats on that dataset.
questions.explanation_zh: 这些数字是把像素先除以 255 后，在 ImageNet 训练集上算出的统计量。用它们做标准化能让你的输入分布对齐到网络训练时见过的分布。如果模型训练用的是别的数据集，就要在那个数据集上重新算统计量。

questions.question: You resize a segmentation mask (integer class IDs 0..20) from 500x500 to 224x224. Which interpolation method is correct?
questions.question_zh: 你要把一张分割掩码（整数类别 ID 0..20）从 500x500 缩放到 224x224，应该用哪种插值？
options: Bilinear — it smooths the class boundaries
Bicubic — it preserves sharpness
Lanczos — highest quality
Nearest neighbour — it preserves valid integer class IDs instead of inventing fractional ones
options_zh: Bilinear——它能让类别边界更平滑
Bicubic——它能保持锐度
Lanczos——质量最高
Nearest neighbour——它能保留有效的整数类别 ID，不会臆造出分数值
questions.explanation: Bilinear, bicubic, and lanczos average neighbouring values. On a class-ID mask that produces non-integer values like 4.7 between class 4 and class 5, which are not real classes. Nearest neighbour picks the closest original pixel and keeps the label space intact. This rule also applies to any channel that encodes IDs or indices.
questions.explanation_zh: Bilinear、bicubic、lanczos 都会对邻域像素做平均。在类别 ID 掩码上，这会得到类似 4.7 这样的非整数值（处于类别 4 和 5 之间），但根本不存在这种类别。Nearest neighbour 直接挑最近的原像素，保持标签空间完整。任何编码 ID 或索引的通道都遵循这条规则。

questions.question: RGB grayscale conversion uses weights 0.299 R + 0.587 G + 0.114 B rather than 0.333 R + 0.333 G + 0.333 B. Why?
options: To compensate for JPEG compression artifacts in each channel
Because green photons carry more energy than red or blue photons
Because human vision is most sensitive to green and least sensitive to blue, so the weighted sum matches perceived luminance
To match the behaviour of the Bayer filter on camera sensors
options_zh: 为了补偿每个通道里的 JPEG 压缩伪影
因为绿色光子比红色或蓝色光子能量更高
因为人眼对绿色最敏感、对蓝色最不敏感，加权求和能匹配感知到的亮度
为了匹配相机传感器上 Bayer 滤色片的行为
questions.explanation: The ITU-R BT.601 weights 0.299/0.587/0.114 come from the luminous efficiency of the human eye. An equal-weight average would make green-tinted images look too dark and red ones too bright to a human observer. Most classical computer-vision grayscale code uses these weights; BT.709 (0.2126/0.7152/0.0722) is the modern HDTV variant for linear-light inputs.
questions.explanation_zh: ITU-R BT.601 的权重 0.299/0.587/0.114 来自人眼对各波长的视见效率。如果三通道等权平均，偏绿的图片在观察者眼里会偏暗、偏红的偏亮。大部分经典计算机视觉的灰度代码都用这组权重；BT.709（0.2126/0.7152/0.0722）是面向线性光输入的现代 HDTV 版本。
